Package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions

package dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions
Configuration related to subscription keys and management.

    Package
    Description
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules
    Sub-modules for specific supporter configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform
    Platform-specific subscription configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.dummy
    Dummy configuration classes for testing or placeholders.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.feature
    Configuration for feature-based access control.
  • Class
    Description
    Subscription
    Represents a subscription configuration A subscription might be retrieved on different platforms A default platform set can be found in Platform
    SubscriptionKey
    Represents a unique identifier for a subscription.
